creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
thanks for committing the up stream changes [1] to resolve the repeated
50 day hangs on 11.0R. It seems the PORTREVISION bump is missing which
means binary packages won't realise there is a very useful change included. Please bump it!

[1]: https://www.mail-archive.com/haproxy@formilux.org/msg25809.html
